title: Verify Trial Corner Hub displays correct status information
description: Test that when user clicks the trial widget/pill, the Trial Corner page displays status, promise copy, and action buttons correctly
preconditions: User is on homepage with visible trial widget

steps.description: 1. Click on the trial widget/pill in the header
2. Wait for Trial Corner page to load
3. Verify the Hero section shows trial status with remaining days
4. Verify 'Your ₹1 trial is active' status is displayed
5. Verify 'Easy cancellation anytime. No hidden loops' promise is shown
6. Verify Cancel & Pause buttons are visible

expected_result: Trial Corner displays all expected sections: Hero with remaining days, status message, cancellation promise, and action buttons
